meta.title: Smart Habit Tracker - Pregenerated Skill Library
meta.note: This is the static seed data bundled with the app so the skill library works even if the live AI backend is unavailable post-deployment. New skills added by the user go through the AI expansion pipeline at runtime and follow this exact schema.

C++ DSA.name: Arrays & Strings
C++ DSA.learn: Time/space complexity, in-place ops, prefix sums, sliding window, two pointers.
C++ DSA.implement: Solve 15 array/string problems (easy-medium) from scratch in C++.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Text Analyzer CLI' that computes word frequency, longest substring w/o repeat, anagram groups.

subtopics.name: Two Pointers & Sliding Window
subtopics.implement: Code max subarray sum (k), remove duplicates in-place.
subtopics.mini_project: Mini: longest substring without repeating characters tool.

subtopics.name: Prefix Sum & Kadane's
subtopics.learn: Cumulative sums, subarray sum problems, max subarray.
subtopics.implement: Implement prefix-sum range-query struct + Kadane's.

subtopics.name: String Manipulation
subtopics.learn: Hashing, anagrams, palindrome checks, KMP basics.
subtopics.implement: Implement anagram grouping + palindrome partitioning.
subtopics.mini_project: Mini: palindrome checker + anagram grouper CLI.

C++ DSA.name: Linked Lists
C++ DSA.learn: Singly/doubly/circular lists, pointer manipulation, Floyd's cycle detection.
C++ DSA.implement: Implement all list types + reversal + cycle detection from scratch.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Music Playlist Manager' using doubly circular linked list.

subtopics.name: Singly Linked List Ops
subtopics.implement: Code full singly LL class with reversal.

subtopics.name: Doubly & Circular LL
subtopics.implement: Implement DLL + circular queue on top of it.

subtopics.name: Cycle Detection & Merge
subtopics.learn: Floyd's tortoise-hare, merge k sorted lists.
subtopics.implement: Implement cycle detection + merge-k-lists via heap.
subtopics.mini_project: Mini: LRU-adjacent cycle detector for a graph of tasks.

C++ DSA.name: Stacks, Queues & Monotonic Structures
C++ DSA.learn: LIFO/FIFO fundamentals, monotonic stack/queue, deque applications.
C++ DSA.implement: Implement stack/queue from array & linked list; solve monotonic stack problems.

subtopics.name: Stack Fundamentals
subtopics.learn: Array vs LL stack, balanced parens, min-stack.
subtopics.implement: Code min-stack O(1) getMin, valid parentheses.
subtopics.mini_project: Mini: bracket-matching linter for code snippets.

subtopics.name: Queue & Deque
subtopics.learn: Circular queue, deque, sliding window max.
subtopics.implement: Implement deque-based sliding window maximum.

subtopics.name: Monotonic Stack Patterns
subtopics.implement: Solve largest rectangle in histogram, daily temperatures.

C++ DSA.name: Trees & BST
C++ DSA.learn: Traversals, height/diameter, BST properties, balancing intuition (AVL/Red-Black concept).
C++ DSA.implement: Implement BT/BST with all traversals, insert/delete/search, LCA.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'File System Explorer' modeled as an n-ary tree with search.

subtopics.name: Tree Traversals
subtopics.implement: Code all four traversal styles.

subtopics.name: BST Operations
subtopics.implement: Implement full BST class + validation.

subtopics.name: LCA & Balancing Concepts
subtopics.learn: LCA algorithms, AVL rotation intuition, height balance.
subtopics.implement: Code LCA (binary tree + BST), check balanced tree.

C++ DSA.name: Heaps & Priority Structures
C++ DSA.learn: Heap property, heapify, priority queues, k-way merge patterns.
C++ DSA.implement: Implement min/max heap from scratch; solve top-k problems.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Task Scheduler' that always executes the highest-priority job.

subtopics.name: Heap Construction
subtopics.implement: Code heap class with insert/extract-min.

subtopics.name: Priority Queue Applications
subtopics.learn: Top-k elements, k closest points, merge k lists.
subtopics.implement: Solve top-k frequent elements using heap.

subtopics.name: Advanced Heap Patterns
subtopics.implement: Implement sliding window median.
subtopics.mini_project: Mini: leaderboard with live rank updates.

C++ DSA.name: Graph Theory
C++ DSA.learn: Representations, BFS/DFS, shortest path (Dijkstra/Bellman-Ford), MST (Kruskal/Prim), DSU.
C++ DSA.implement: Implement adjacency list graph + all core traversal/path algorithms.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Campus Navigation System' finding shortest path between buildings.

subtopics.name: BFS/DFS Traversal
subtopics.implement: Code BFS/DFS + number of islands.

subtopics.name: Shortest Path Algorithms
subtopics.implement: Implement Dijkstra with priority queue.

subtopics.name: MST & Disjoint Set Union
subtopics.learn: Kruskal's, Prim's, DSU with path compression.
subtopics.implement: Implement DSU + Kruskal's MST.

C++ DSA.name: Dynamic Programming
C++ DSA.learn: Memoization vs tabulation, knapsack family, LCS/LIS, MCM, Catalan numbers.
C++ DSA.implement: Solve DP problems bottom-up with explicit state tables.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Trip Budget Optimizer' (0-1 knapsack variant) with constraints.

subtopics.name: Knapsack Family
subtopics.implement: Implement all four knapsack variants.

subtopics.name: String DP (LCS/LIS)
subtopics.learn: Longest common subsequence, longest increasing subsequence, edit distance.
subtopics.implement: Code LCS, LIS (O(n log n)), edit distance.

subtopics.name: Interval & Partition DP
subtopics.learn: Matrix chain multiplication, palindrome partitioning, Catalan numbers.
subtopics.implement: Implement MCM + palindrome partition DP.

C++ DSA.name: Segment Trees & Advanced Structures
C++ DSA.learn: Segment trees, Fenwick/BIT, trie, point/range update-query.
C++ DSA.implement: Implement segment tree + BIT supporting range sum/min/max.
C++ DSA.mini_project: Build a 'Live Leaderboard Range Query' service.

subtopics.name: Segment Tree Basics
subtopics.implement: Code segment tree for range sum.

subtopics.name: Fenwick Tree (BIT)
subtopics.learn: Prefix sums with O(log n) updates.
subtopics.implement: Implement BIT for frequency counting.

subtopics.name: Trie & String Structures
subtopics.implement: Implement trie insert/search/prefix-match.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Math Foundations for Physics
C++ Physics Engine.learn: Vectors, matrices, quaternions, dot/cross products, transforms.
C++ Physics Engine.implement: Build a custom Vec2/Vec3/Mat4/Quaternion math library.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Mini engine demo rotating/translating shapes using your own math lib.

subtopics.name: Vector Algebra
subtopics.implement: Implement Vec2/Vec3 class with operators.

subtopics.name: Matrices & Transforms
subtopics.implement: Implement Mat4 with transform composition.

subtopics.name: Quaternions
subtopics.learn: Why quaternions over Euler angles, slerp.
subtopics.implement: Implement quaternion class + slerp interpolation.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Kinematics & Integration
C++ Physics Engine.learn: Position/velocity/acceleration, Euler vs Verlet vs RK4 integration.
C++ Physics Engine.implement: Implement explicit Euler, semi-implicit Euler, and Verlet integrators.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Build a 'Projectile Motion Sandbox' comparing integrator accuracy.

subtopics.name: Explicit vs Semi-Implicit Euler
subtopics.implement: Code both integrators for a falling ball.

subtopics.name: Verlet Integration
subtopics.implement: Implement Verlet integrator for a bouncing ball.

subtopics.learn: Higher-order accuracy, when it's worth the cost.
subtopics.implement: Implement RK4 for orbital motion.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Rigid Body Dynamics
C++ Physics Engine.learn: Mass, center of mass, moment of inertia, torque, angular momentum.
C++ Physics Engine.implement: Implement rigid body class with linear + angular state.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Build a 'Spinning Object Playground' with torque application.

subtopics.name: Mass Properties
subtopics.learn: Center of mass & inertia tensor for polygons.
subtopics.implement: Compute COM/inertia for user-drawn 2D polygon.

subtopics.name: Force & Torque Application
subtopics.learn: Applying forces at offsets, resulting torque.
subtopics.implement: Implement apply-force-at-point.

subtopics.name: Angular Dynamics
subtopics.implement: Simulate free-spinning rigid body.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Broadphase Collision Detection
C++ Physics Engine.learn: AABB, bounding volume hierarchies, spatial partitioning (grid/quadtree).
C++ Physics Engine.implement: Implement AABB overlap tests + a uniform spatial grid.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Build a 'Particle Swarm Collision Culler' visual demo.

subtopics.name: AABB & Bounding Volumes
subtopics.implement: Implement AABB-vs-AABB test.

subtopics.name: Spatial Partitioning
subtopics.implement: Implement a quadtree for 2D collision culling.

subtopics.name: BVH Basics
subtopics.implement: Build a simple static BVH.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Narrowphase Collision & Resolution
C++ Physics Engine.learn: SAT, GJK/EPA concepts, contact manifolds, impulse resolution.
C++ Physics Engine.implement: Implement SAT for convex polygon collision detection.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Build a '2D Physics Sandbox' with colliding, bouncing polygons.

subtopics.name: Separating Axis Theorem
subtopics.implement: Implement SAT collision test.

subtopics.name: GJK/EPA Concepts
subtopics.learn: Simplex construction, penetration depth extraction (conceptual + simplified impl).
subtopics.implement: Implement simplified GJK for circles/polygons.

subtopics.name: Impulse-Based Resolution
subtopics.implement: Implement impulse resolution for 2 colliding bodies.

C++ Physics Engine.name: Constraints & Solvers
C++ Physics Engine.learn: Constraint types (distance, hinge, spring), sequential impulse solver.
C++ Physics Engine.mini_project: Build a 'Rope/Cloth Simulator' using constraint solving.

subtopics.implement: Implement a rope of connected points.

subtopics.name: Spring Constraints
subtopics.implement: Implement spring-damper system.
